name: Jira
description: Jira is commonly used to support product workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Jira when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in product work.
founderWorkflow: Use Jira to keep product work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Jira before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
